doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_flags_restore (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L133-L141). Five-line C body:
  __gmpfr_flags = (__gmpfr_flags & (MPFR_FLAGS_ALL ^ mask)) | (flags & mask)

Replaces the bits of __gmpfr_flags named in mask with the corresponding bits of flags; bits NOT in mask are preserved from the prior register state.

The TS port takes (pre, flags, mask) where pre is the prior global flag state. Returns `(pre & ~mask | (flags & mask)) & MPFR_FLAGS_ALL`.

Class 'misc' (1000ms per-case budget). Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c:
Three divergences:

  1. Return type: C void -> TS bigint (new state).

  2. Parameter list: C takes (flags, mask); TS takes (pre, flags, mask) -- pre encodes the prior global state. The 3-input wire form lets the grader synthesize the C side's deterministic post-state.

  3. Mechanism: `((pre & ~mask) | (flags & mask)) & 63n`.
refs: mpfr/src/exceptions.c L133-L141 -- the C reference body.
src/internal/mpfr/flags.ts -- the TS flag register module.
